description_long: This is a military-style helicopter with a streamlined, olive-green fuselage and a prominent main rotor with four long, slender blades. The cockpit is located at the front, featuring multiple angular windows with dark tinting and reinforced framing. The helicopter is equipped with a tail boom ending in a tail rotor with three blades, and the landing gear consists of two robust, tubular skids. Various small details such as antennas, side-mounted equipment, and access panels are visible along the body. The surface finish is matte, with subtle panel lines and a few yellow markings for visibility and safety. The overall design suggests durability and functionality for urban or tactical operations.
description: A matte olive-green helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, angular cockpit windows, and sturdy landing skids, featuring military-style details and yellow markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow nose, angular cockpit windows, and the symmetrical spread of the four main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit window arrangement, landing skids, and the full length of the tail boom with the tail rotor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the alignment of the landing skids beneath the fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the helicopter's body, rotor system, and tail structure, with visible side equipment and markings.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, narrow main rotor blades made of composite material, each approximately 7 meters in length, colored black with subtle yellow tips and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Three-blade tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored black with yellow tips, no protective shroud visible.
attribute_landing_skids: Two tubular, black landing skids with crossbars for stability, made of metal, attached directly to the underside of the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five angular cockpit windows at the front, arranged in a wraparound configuration, medium-sized with dark tint and reinforced black framing.
